title: The Parson's Looks.
content:
That there is falsehood in his looks
            I must and will deny;
        They say their master is a knave,
            And sure they do not lie.
meaning:
"The Parson's Looks." is a quintessential example of Robert Burns's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
